evidence_basis: MSigDB Hallmark IFN-alpha response lists CMPK2; PLOS Biology describes CMPK2 as a type-I IFN-induced ISG with antiviral restriction activity.

evidence_basis: MSigDB Hallmark IFN-alpha and IFN-gamma response sets list TAP1; TAP1 is part of MHC-I antigen peptide transport.
